2235900.name: RPG Maker MZ - Another World Heroine Generator 3 for MZ
2235900.description:
Equip your sorceresses, healers, and martial artists with new outfits and hairstyles with the help of Another World Heroine Generator 3 for MZ! Gee-kun-soft is back with another MZ generator pack that adds 41 new parts to the female generator, covering clothing, hairstyles, and small accessories perfect for showing your characters’ personalities! Create a twin-tailed brunette in a jacket who is a master hacker, a fighter with long bangs hanging in her face and an armored claw on one arm, a horned demon with tiny wings dressed in a shawl draped over a lightweight top, and more with this pack!

20 clothing options cover a variety of styles, from tight tracksuit-like tops paired with gloves and layered robes to a flowing dancer’s outfit and dresses with ruffled white sleeves sticking out that a vampire queen would love. Find the perfect top with flowing long sleeves for your healer to wear while the foe-turned-friend succubus wears a skintight piece topped with a comfy scarf. 5 rear hair and 5 front hair choices bring new bangs and 4 new ponytails to the generator. Want something simpler? Then grab the shoulder-length hair option instead. And with your base heroine made, finish them off with 2 AccB, 3 beast ears, and 1 set of wings to truly let your character shine. Hair clips shaped like shields are a nice addition to your warrior maiden, and 2 different horn types are ready to help you add demonkin to your game world.

So pick up Another World Heroine Generator 3 for MZ today and give your heroines some lovely makeovers!

Included materials:

* Hair: Bangs x5, back hair x5
* Eyes × 5
* Head accessories x2, animal ears (horns and feathers) x2, wings x1
* Fantasy clothes × 20

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
2235900.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
